description: Global instructions template configuration and metadata

codex.description: Codex CLI global instructions (no header required)

text_replacements.Use `ask_user` for clarification questio: Ask the user directly in the conversation for clarification questions when blocked or ambiguous.
text_replacements.Use `ask_user` for interactive clarifica: Ask the user directly in the conversation for clarification when required.
text_replacements.ask_user: Use for interactive clarificat: User clarification: Ask directly in the conversation when clarification is required.
text_replacements.After completing a major mission (multi-: After completing a major mission (multi-step, repeatable, or cross-cutting work), ask the user in the conversation if they want a reusable skill created for this workflow.
text_replacements.1. Use `ask_user` to clarify ambiguity: 1. Ask the user directly in the conversation to clarify ambiguity

opencode.description: Opencode primary system instructions (no header required)

copilot.parser_notes: Content must not start with XML-style tags immediately after frontmatter. Add plain text/markdown first to avoid parser failure.

claude.description: Claude desktop app instructions (no header required)

gemini.description: Gemini CLI global instructions (no header required)
gemini.notes: Gemini uses plain agent names without @ prefix. Text replacements handle this automatically.

coordination_mode.description: Internal coordination guidance for systems without subagent capabilities

features.section_filtering: Use <!-- SECTION:id:START:system1,system2 --> to include/exclude sections per system
features.text_replacements: Use text_replacements in system config to replace system-specific terminology
features.header_injection: Use requires_header: true to inject system-specific headers

changes: Implemented @ prefix removal for Gemini subagent references
Enhanced filter_sections_for_system() to support text replacements
Added section filtering with include/exclude syntax
